slides.title: IB Weekly Report
slides.subtitle: March 12, 2026
slides.catchphrase: Diagnosing Match = 0 — What's Broken & What We Do Next

content.heading: Conversion breaks at Interview
bullets: Drop-off is NOT at registration or application

slides.title: Why Is It Stuck? — Root Cause Tree

columns.heading: ① No Rec. Flow
bullets: No owner assigned when a student applies
Applications sit — no push to companies

columns.heading: ② Companies Silent
bullets: No SLA — companies never agreed to a deadline
IBE has no weekly follow-up habit
Selection progress is invisible to IBE

columns.heading: ③ Student Mismatch
bullets: Many students are overseas / not in Tokyo
Work eligibility not checked at apply stage
No pre-filter — wrong applicants get through

items.title: Build the Rec. Flow
items.description: Define: screen within 48h → assign to company → follow up in 5 days. Templatize it this week.

items.title: Fix Company SLA
items.description: Add '5 biz day response' to onboarding. Start weekly check-in emails to all active companies from next week.

items.title: Add Entry Filter
items.description: Add location + work eligibility to the application form. Block ineligible applicants before they enter the funnel.
